positive: A stylized celestial botanical illustration featuring intertwined crescent moons, blooming stardust flowers, and glowing nebula tendrils, forming a central, symmetrical mandala pattern. The style is detailed linework mixed with smooth watercolor gradients, reminiscent of vintage esoteric engraving but with modern, luminous pop art colors. Use a deep midnight blue and sapphire gradient background contrasted sharply with metallic gold and iridescent lavender highlights. The composition must be perfectly centered and ready for high-contrast textile printing, with clean, discernible silhouettes and no gradients bleeding into solid blocks of color. Studio lighting, hyper-detailed, symmetrical, vector art quality.
